results.title: UH ace Magdaleno enters portal as backup to MLB draft dream
results.description: In a move designed with the draft in mind, University of Hawaii pitching ace Isaiah Magdaleno has entered the NCAA transfer portal. The post UH ace Magdaleno enters portal as backup to MLB draft dream appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: England surges to thrilling opening win against Croatia
results.description: Anthony Barry did not hold back in his half-time assessment of England’s opening 2026 World Cup match against Croatia. The post England surges to thrilling opening win against Croatia appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .
